Variables.Name: SectionBaseX
Variables.Description: X offset from global components grid origin (in quads)

Variables.Name: SectionBaseY
Variables.Description: Y offset from global components grid origin (in quads)

Variables.Name: ComponentSizeQuads
Variables.Description: Total number of quads for this component, has to be >0

Variables.Name: SubsectionSizeQuads
Variables.Description: Number of quads for a subsection of the component. SubsectionSizeQuads+1 must be a power of two.

Variables.Name: NumSubsections
Variables.Description: Number of subsections in X or Y axis

Variables.Name: WeightmapLayerAllocations
Variables.Description: List of layers, and the weightmap and channel they are stored

Variables.Name: WeightmapTextures
Variables.Description: Weightmap texture reference

Variables.Name: SplatmapTextures
Variables.Description: Helper to getset splatmap data, hold reference to splatmap textures

Variables.Name: bUseMaterialId
Variables.Description: Cached value of bUseMaterialId, should be equal to bUseMaterialId in ALandscape

Variables.Name: WeightmapTextures_ForPC
Variables.Description: Weightmap texture reference

Variables.Name: VisibilityLayerChannel
Variables.Description: Visibility layer channel in weightmap

Variables.Name: XYOffsetmapTexture
Variables.Description: XYOffsetmap texture reference

Variables.Name: WeightmapScaleBias
Variables.Description: UV offset to component's weightmap data from component local coordinates

Variables.Name: WeightmapSubsectionOffset
Variables.Description: U or V offset into the weightmap for the first subsection, in texture UV space

Variables.Name: HeightmapScaleBias
Variables.Description: UV offset to Heightmap data from component local coordinates

Variables.Name: HeightmapTexture
Variables.Description: Heightmap texture reference

Variables.Name: CachedLocalBox
Variables.Description: Cached local-space bounding box, created at heightmap update time

Variables.Name: CollisionComponent
Variables.Description: Reference to associated collision component

Variables.Name: SplatmapScaleBias
Variables.Description: UV offset to component's splatmap data from component local coordinates

Variables.Name: MapBuildDataId
Variables.Description: Uniquely identifies this component's built map data.

Variables.Name: IrrelevantLights_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Legacy irrelevant lights

Variables.Name: CollisionMipLevel
Variables.Description: Heightfield mipmap used to generate collision

Variables.Name: SimpleCollisionMipLevel
Variables.Description: Heightfield mipmap used to generate simple collision

Variables.Name: NegativeZBoundsExtension
Variables.Description:
Allows overriding the landscape bounds. This is useful if you distort the landscape with world-position-offset, for example
	   Extension value in the negative Z axis, positive value increases bound size

Variables.Name: PositiveZBoundsExtension
Variables.Description:
Allows overriding the landscape bounds. This is useful if you distort the landscape with world-position-offset, for example
	   Extension value in the positive Z axis, positive value increases bound size

Variables.Name: StaticLightingResolution
Variables.Description: StaticLightingResolution overriding per component, default value 0 means no overriding

Variables.Name: ForcedLOD
Variables.Description: Forced LOD level to use when rendering

Variables.Name: LODBias
Variables.Description: LOD level Bias to use when rendering

Variables.Name: MobileVertexHoleMaxLOD
Variables.Description: The max lod level that allow landscape component to use vertex hole. If the lod level greater than this limitation, all vertex hole on landscape will vanish

Variables.Name: LODDeltaVertex
Variables.Description: Subsection's Delta Vertex for fixing LOD level

Variables.Name: BakedTextureMaterialGuid
Variables.Description: The Material Guid that used when baking, to detect material recompilations

Variables.Name: GIBakedBaseColorTexture
Variables.Description: Pre-baked Base Color texture for use by distance field GI

Variables.Name: MobileBlendableLayerMask
Variables.Description: For ES2

Variables.Name: MobileMaterialInterface
Variables.Description: Material interface used for ES2. Serialized only when cooking or loading cooked builds.

Variables.Name: MobileWeightmapTextures
Variables.Description: Generated weightnormal map texture used for ES2. Serialized only when cooking or loading cooked builds.

Variables.Name: bHasROCData
Variables.Description: Has ROCData？
